module-checks.check-1: Authenticated owner can retrieve full MTProto proxy payload.
module-checks.check-2: Non-owner or unauthenticated requests cannot retrieve proxy secret.
module-checks.check-3: Frontend build passes after adding MTProto card and API types.

scenarios.scenario-1: Verified user sees Telegram proxy card on dashboard.
scenarios.scenario-2: Copy/open actions expose link, server, port, and secret only to owner UI.
scenarios.scenario-3: Pending or degraded bridge state renders actionable empty state.

redaction-rules.rule-1: HTTP logs and frontend console logs must not print full tg://proxy links or secrets.
